risk_rationale: The INFORM Consumers Act introduces new requirements for online marketplaces to verify third-party sellers, which aligns with TikTok's existing merchant verification policy but may require additional transparency measures.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: Merchant verification: KYC mandatory before onboarding
compliance_gaps.regulatory_requirement: Requires online marketplaces to verify third-party sellers and enhance transparency in online transactions.
compliance_gaps.gap_description: The baseline requires KYC for merchant verification but may not fully address the transparency requirements mandated by the INFORM Consumers Act.

remediations.title: Enhance Seller Verification and Transparency
remediations.description: Implement additional transparency measures for third-party seller information, including public disclosure of seller identity and contact information as required by the INFORM Consumers Act.
acceptance_criteria: Third-party seller information is publicly disclosed in compliance with the INFORM Consumers Act.
Verification process includes enhanced transparency measures.

business_impact: Failure to comply with the INFORM Consumers Act could result in regulatory penalties and damage to brand reputation in the US market.
recommended_actions: Review and update the merchant verification process to include transparency measures.
Coordinate with legal and compliance teams to ensure alignment with the INFORM Consumers Act.
Communicate changes to affected sellers and provide guidance on compliance requirements.
